AggregationMethod.description:
Methode voor aggregatie van transmissieverliezen op gebouwniveau.

ISSO 51:2023 §3.5.1 zegt letterlijk: `Φ_basis = Φ_T,ie + Φ_T,iae + Φ_T,ig + Φ_i − Φ_gain`, inclusief verlies via onverwarmde ruimtes (`Φ_T,iae`). De markt-tool Vabi telt `Φ_T,iae` op gebouwniveau echter als 0 (rapporteert het wel per kamer, neemt het niet op in `Φ_basis_gebouw`). Voor projecten die met Vabi-uitvoer vergeleken moeten worden geeft strikte normuitvoering ~17% hogere `connection_capacity`.

Daarom configurable per project, default = `VabiCompat` (markt-conventie).

oneOf.description: Φ_T,iae wordt NIET opgenomen in Φ_basis_gebouw (Vabi-conventie, markt-default). Wijkt af van ISSO 51:2023 §3.5.1 letterlijk, maar geeft Vabi-compatible getallen.
Φ_T,iae WEL in Φ_basis_gebouw conform ISSO 51:2023 §3.5.1 letterlijk. Geeft ~17% hogere connection_capacity dan VabiCompat. Voor strikte audits.

BoundaryType.description: Type of boundary for a construction element. Determines which heat loss formula is applied.

oneOf.description: To an unheated space adjacent to the dwelling (ISSO 51 §2.5.2)
To another heated room within the same dwelling (ISSO 51 §2.5.3)

To open water (canal/river/lake — woonboot use case).

Not a norm category — this is an engineering choice for constructions that sit directly against open water. The design temperature comes from `DesignConditions.theta_water` (default 5 °C, override per project). Reports must include a footnote when this variant is used.

Building.description: Building characteristics that affect the calculation.

aggregation_method.description:
Aggregatiemethode voor `Φ_basis_gebouw` op gebouwniveau.

Default = `VabiCompat` (markt-conventie, sluit `Φ_T,iae` uit). Voor strikte ISSO 51:2023 §3.5.1 audits → `NormStrict`. Zie `AggregationMethod` doc voor verschillen (~17% op connection_capacity).

construction_variant.description:
Uitvoeringsvariant volgens NTA 8800 Tabel 11.14 (tussen / kop / vrijstaand).

Optioneel — alleen relevant bij `infiltration_method = Nta8800Strict`. `None` → val terug op `f_type = 1.0` (tussenwoning-equivalent).

construction_year.description:
Bouwjaar van het gebouw — driver voor NTA 8800 Tabel 11.13 `f_y` bouwjaarcorrectie.

Optioneel — `None` → `f_y = 1.0` (onbekend bouwjaar, neutrale factor).

dwelling_class.description:
Woningclassificatie volgens ISSO 51:2023 Tabel 2.8 (qi,spec keying).

Optioneel — alleen relevant bij `infiltration_method = VabiCompat`. `None` → bestaande legacy-rekenketen blijft van toepassing. Bestaande fixture-JSONs zonder dit veld blijven werken via `serde(default)`.

has_night_setback.description: Whether night setback / operational reduction is used.

infiltration_method.description: Infiltration calculation method. PerExteriorArea (default): q_i = qi_spec × ΣA_exterior (ISSO 51:2023) PerFloorArea: q_i = qi_spec × A_floor (ISSO 51:2024) VabiCompat / Nta8800Strict: zie `InfiltrationMethod` doc.

qv10.description: Air tightness: q_v,10 value in dm³/s. Measured air volume flow at 10 Pa pressure difference.

security_class.description: Security class for heat loss to neighbors.

total_floor_area.description: Total usable floor area (gebruiksoppervlak) A_g in m².

warmup_time.description: Desired warm-up time in hours (typically 1 or 2).

ConstructionElement.description: A single construction element forming part of a room boundary. ISSO 51 §2.5 — each element contributes to the room's heat loss.

adjacent_room_id.description:
ID of the adjacent room (for `BoundaryType::AdjacentRoom`).

The transmission calculation resolves the adjacent room's design temperature at runtime by looking the room up in the `Project` room list. This is the canonical source — `adjacent_temperature` below is a legacy fallback only.

adjacent_temperature.description:
Legacy: hardcoded design temperature of the adjacent space in °C.

**Deprecated** — the calculation now derives the adjacent-room temperature from `adjacent_room_id` via a live lookup in `Project.rooms`. This field is retained for backward compatibility with older saved projects and is only consulted as a fallback when `adjacent_room_id` cannot be resolved. New code should leave this field at `None` and rely on the live room lookup.

area.description: Area of the element in m².

boundary_type.description: Type of boundary this element faces.

catalog_ref.description: Reference to a `CatalogEntry.id` produced by the thermal import. `None` for openings, manually-added elements and projects from before the catalog refactor (legacy projects keep working).

custom_delta_u_tb.description: Custom ΔU_TB value in W/(m²·K) if not using the forfaitaire method. Overrides the default 0.1 W/(m²·K) correction.

ground_params.description: Ground parameters, only for BoundaryType::Ground elements.

has_embedded_heating.description: Whether this element has floor/wall/ceiling heating behind it. Relevant for system loss calculations (§2.9).

material_type.description: Material type: masonry or non-masonry. Affects thermal bridge correction in the forfaitaire method.

temperature_factor.description: Temperature correction factor f_k (dimensionless). For exterior elements: typically 1.0. For unheated spaces: from ISSO 51 Table 4.1. For adjacent rooms: calculated from temperature difference. For neighboring dwellings: calculated with Δθ corrections. Set to `None` to have it auto-calculated.

use_forfaitaire_thermal_bridge.description: Whether to use the forfaitaire thermal bridge correction (ΔU_TB = 0.1). Only applies to exterior boundary elements (BoundaryType::Exterior).

uw_breakdown.description:
Onderbouwing van de samengestelde raam-U-waarde (U_w).

Optioneel, alleen aanwezig op kozijn-/vullings-elementen waarvoor de U_w-calculator is gebruikt. De rekenkern negeert dit veld volledig — uitsluitend `u_value` is de rekeningang. `uw_breakdown` dient als persistente onderbouwing zodat de calculator herladen kan worden en de opbouw in het rapport terechtkomt. `None` voor alle niet-kozijn elementen en voor projecten van vóór de U_w-calculator.

vertical_position.description: Vertical position: floor, ceiling, or wall. Used for fb calculation to neighboring dwellings.

ConstructionVariant.description:
Uitvoeringsvariant volgens NTA 8800 Tabel 11.14 — bepaalt de correctie- factor `f_type` op de luchtdoorlatendheid op gebouwniveau.

Bron: NTA 8800:2024 p.487–488 Tabel 11.14.

DesignConditions.description: Design conditions for the heat loss calculation. ISSO 51 §2.7.

theta_b_non_residential.description: Temperature of adjacent buildings with non-residential function in °C.

theta_b_residential.description: Temperature of adjacent buildings with residential function θ_b in °C. Erratum 2023: 17°C for residential, 14°C for non-residential.

theta_e.description: Design outdoor temperature θ_e in °C. Standard for the Netherlands: -10°C.

theta_ground.description:
Design temperature of the ground θ_ground in °C.

Used as a fallback reference for ground-contact constructions when no explicit ground parameters (`ground_params`) are available. Ground heat loss is normally computed via ISSO 51 §2.5.5 (`u_equivalent`, `f_g2`, `G_w`); this field only drives the simplified ΔT display in the frontend and reports. Default 10 °C.

theta_water.description:
Design temperature of open water θ_water in °C.

Used for `BoundaryType::Water` (woonboot use case). Default 5 °C. This is an engineering choice, not a norm value — overridable per project. Reports must include a footnote when any construction uses the Water boundary type.

wind_factor.description: Wind exposure factor (for infiltration correction). Typically 1.0 for normal exposure.

DwellingClass.description:
Woningtype-classificatie volgens ISSO 51:2023 Tabel 2.8 — bepaalt de `q_i,spec` (specifieke infiltratie per m² gebruiksoppervlak) op basis van woningvorm + dakvorm.

**Onderscheiden van** de bestaande [`BuildingType`]: `BuildingType` is een fijnmaziger gebouwclassificatie (Detached / SemiDetached / Terraced / etc.) die elders in de code gebruikt wordt voor warmwordingsfactoren (Tabel 2.13) en winddruk. `DwellingClass` is uitsluitend de drie-rijen-keying van Tabel 2.8 (en optioneel als input voor mapping naar `ConstructionVariant` in NTA 8800 Tabel 11.14).

Bron: ISSO 51:2023 p.41 Tabel 2.8 (waardes via NEN 8088-1).

oneOf.description: Eengezinswoning met kap (hellend dak) → `q_i,spec = 1.0 dm³/(s·m² Ag)`
Eengezinswoning met plat dak → `q_i,spec = 0.7 dm³/(s·m² Ag)`

FrostProtectionType.description: Frost protection method for heat recovery units. Determines the supply temperature θ_t (ISSO 51 Table 2.14, erratum).

oneOf.description: Reduced fan speed and/or temporary imbalance (central)
Reduced fan speed and/or temporary imbalance (decentral)

GroundParameters.description: Parameters for ground heat loss calculation. ISSO 51 §2.5.5, formule (4.18): H_T,ig = 1.45 × G_w × Σ(A_k × f_g2 × U_e,k)

fg2.description: Temperature correction factor f_g2 (dimensionless). Accounts for seasonal ground temperature variation.

ground_water_factor.description: Ground water correction factor G_w (dimensionless). Typically 1.0 for normal conditions, higher for high water table.

u_equivalent.description: Equivalent U-value for the ground element U_e,k in W/(m²·K).

HeatingSystem.description: Type of heating system installed. Affects Δθ values (Table 2.12) and system losses (§2.9).

oneOf.description:
High-temperature radiators/convectors (medium temp > 50°C).

Default variant — statistisch meest voorkomende installatie in Nederlandse woningen. Gebruikt wanneer een Room-JSON zonder `heating_system` veld wordt gedeserialiseerd (third-party clients).
Floor heating as main system (floor temp ≥ 27°C)
Floor heating as main system (floor temp < 27°C)

InfiltrationMethod.description:
Infiltration calculation method. Determines how the specific infiltration rate is applied.

**Legacy varianten** (`PerExteriorArea`, `PerFloorArea`) blijven beschikbaar voor backward-compatibiliteit met bestaande project-JSONs, maar zijn niet (meer) norm-conform met ISSO 51:2023 / NTA 8800 (Tabel 4.3 is geschrapt in de 2023-publicatie). Voor nieuwe projecten: gebruik `VabiCompat` of `Nta8800Strict`.

Zie ook `crates/isso51-core/src/tables/infiltration.rs` voor de onderliggende tabel-functies.

oneOf.description: **Legacy** — per m² exterior construction area (ISSO 51:2017 Tabel 4.3). `q_i = qi_spec_ext × ΣA_exterior`. Default blijft deze variant ivm backward-compat met bestaande fixtures; nieuwe rekenketen gaat via `VabiCompat` / `Nta8800Strict`.
**Legacy** — per m² floor area (eigen tabel, niet norm-conform). `q_i = qi_spec × A_floor`

**Nieuw** — Vabi-compatibele hybride methode: ISSO 51:2023 Tabel 2.8 (`qi_spec` per gebouwtype) gecombineerd met NTA 8800 power-law (`n_lea = 0.67`) en design-Δp = 3.14 Pa (Vabi-fit). Aanbevolen voor projecten die met Vabi-DR resultaten moeten matchen.

**Nieuw** — strikt NTA 8800 Tabel 11.14 + 11.13 keten: `q_v10;lea;ref = f_type × f_y × q_v10;spec;reken`, gevolgd door power-law (`n_lea = 0.67`). Geen Vabi-fit; design-Δp volgens NTA 8800 (4 Pa-domein).

**Nieuw** — formule (11.85) met `building.qv10` als directe input.

Voor projecten waar de luchtdoorlatendheid daadwerkelijk gemeten is (blower-door test). Slaat Tabel 2.8 / `f_type` / `f_y` over — de gemeten waarde verdisconteert deze al. Keten reduceert tot: `qi = qv10 × (Δp_design / 10)^n_lea × f_inf`. Replicateert Vabi-DR-keten exact (Δp = 3.14 Pa) op fixtures waar `qv10` gemeten is.

MaterialType.description: Material type for thermal bridge correction. Determines whether ΔU_TB = 0.1 is applied per the forfaitaire method.

Room.description: A single room (vertrek) in the dwelling. ISSO 51 Chapter 4 — per-room heat loss calculation.

clamp_positive.description: Whether this room is part of a heated zone that should not have negative heat loss (i.e., minimum Φ = 0).

constructions.description: Construction elements forming the room boundaries.

custom_temperature.description: Custom design indoor temperature θ_i in °C. If set, overrides the temperature from RoomFunction.

floor_area.description: Floor area (gebruiksoppervlak) in m². Used for ventilation rate calculations.

fraction_outside_air.description: Fraction of ventilation air coming directly from outside (factor a). For rooms with both outside and internal air supply. ISSO 51 formule 4.7: H_v = 1.2 × ((a × q_v × f_v1) + (1-a) × q_v × f_v2)

function.description: Room function determines the design indoor temperature.

has_mechanical_exhaust.description: Whether this room has mechanical exhaust. Affects ventilation loss calculation (formule 4.7).

has_mechanical_supply.description: Whether this room has mechanical supply.

heating_system.description: Heating system installed in this room. Defaults to `HeatingSystem::default()` (`RadiatorHt`) when missing from input JSON — protects third-party clients from missing-field errors.

internal_air_temperature.description: Temperature of the internal air source θ_a in °C. For rooms receiving air from a hallway or other internal space.

supply_air_temperature.description: Temperature of the supply air θ_t in °C. For natural supply: θ_t = θ_e (design outdoor temperature). For mechanical supply with heat recovery: depends on system.

ventilation_rate.description: Ventilation volume flow rate q_v in dm³/s. If None, automatically calculated from BBL minimum requirements based on room function and floor area.

RoomFunction.description: Room function determines the design indoor temperature (θ_i). Values from ISSO 51 Table 2.11.

oneOf.description: Storage room / bergruimte (5°C if frost protection needed)
Attic / zolder used as living space (20°C)

SecurityClass.description: Security class for heat loss to neighbors. ISSO 51 Table 2.16.

oneOf.description: Class A: no heat loss to neighbors assumed (c_z = 0)
Class C: high risk, neighbors may not heat (c_z = 1.0)

Spacer.description:
Type randafstandhouder voor de Ψ_g-waarde van de beglazingsrand.

Mirror van `nta8800_tables::glazing_edge::SpacerKind` — lokaal gedefinieerd om geen crate-dependency op `nta8800-tables` te introduceren in `isso51-core`. De 4 varianten en hun snake_case serialisatie moeten gelijk blijven aan de bron-enum.

UwBreakdown.description:
Onderbouwing van de samengestelde raam-U-waarde U_w.

Volgens NEN-EN-ISO 10077-1: `U_w = (ΣA_g·U_g + ΣA_f·U_f + Σl_g·Ψ_g) / (ΣA_g + ΣA_f)`.

Standaard-detailniveau: uniform kozijn — één U_g voor alle ruiten, één U_f, uniforme profielbreedte. Afgeleide waarden (`a_g_m2`, `a_f_m2`, `l_g_m`, `u_w`) worden gecachet maar zijn herberekenbaar uit de invoer.

a_f_m2.description: Afgeleid: totale profieloppervlakte ΣA_f in m². Gecachet, herberekenbaar.

a_g_m2.description: Afgeleid: totale glasoppervlakte ΣA_g in m². Gecachet, herberekenbaar.

l_g_m.description: Afgeleid: totale zichtbare glasrand-omtrek Σl_g in m. Gecachet, herberekenbaar.

psi_g.description: Effectieve lineaire warmtedoorgangscoëfficiënt Ψ_g van de beglazingsrand in W/(m·K).

psi_g_is_manual.description: `true` wanneer `psi_g` een handmatige override is op de spacer-tabelwaarde.

spacer.description: Type randafstandhouder voor de Ψ_g-tabelwaarde. `None` = volledig handmatige Ψ_g-invoer.

u_f.description: Profiel-U-waarde U_f in W/(m²·K) — handmatige invoer van de profielfabrikant.

u_g.description: Glas-U-waarde U_g in W/(m²·K) — handmatige invoer van de glasleverancier.

u_w.description: Resultaat: samengestelde raam-U-waarde U_w in W/(m²·K).

frost_protection.description: Frost protection type for the heat recovery unit.

has_preheating.description: Whether there is pre-heating of supply air (without WTW).

heat_recovery_efficiency.description: Heat recovery efficiency (0.0 to 1.0). E.g., 0.85 for 85% efficiency.

supply_temperature.description: Supply air temperature θ_t in °C after heat recovery. If not set, will be calculated from efficiency and frost protection.

system_type.description: Type of ventilation system (A through E).

VentilationSystemType.description: Ventilation system type (A through E). ISSO 51 §2.5.7.

oneOf.description: System A: Natural supply and natural exhaust
System B: Mechanical supply and natural exhaust
System C: Natural supply and mechanical exhaust
System D: Mechanical supply and mechanical exhaust (balanced)
System E: Combination of systems within one dwelling

VerticalPosition.description: Position of a construction element relative to adjacent buildings. Used for floor/ceiling fb calculation.

description: Top-level project containing all input data for the calculation.
title: Project
